root_cause: The visible caller passes a fixed 48-byte key buffer from vendor_manifest_key_from_file directly to vendor_manifest_stamp. The manifest key parsed from manifest-feed.bin is longer than the buffer, so the producer copies 48 bytes and leaves no NULL terminator. vendor_manifest_stamp treats the buffer as an in-place C string and writes past key[47], first overwriting canary[0] at key[48].
